title: Meridian Maps
description: Interactive geospatial platform for urban planning with 3D building visualizations.
overview: Meridian Maps helps city planners visualize zoning changes, traffic patterns, and proposed developments on an interactive 3D map. Built as a freelance project for a municipal consultancy.
challenge: Rendering thousands of building footprints with height data while maintaining 60fps on mid-range laptops. Planners needed to toggle layers, draw polygons, and export PDF reports — all in the browser.
solution: I combined Mapbox GL JS for base tiles with a custom Three.js layer for extruded buildings, using instanced meshes for performance. A Web Worker handles geospatial calculations off the main thread. Export uses html2canvas with a server-side PDF merge.
results: Handles 15,000 building footprints at 60fps on M1 MacBooks. Reduced report generation from 45 minutes to 3 minutes. Won a follow-on contract for phase two features.
